description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent gable roof and a large covered front porch supported by white columns. The facade features symmetrical window placement, with double-hung windows and decorative trim, and a central entryway with steps leading up to the porch. The house is surrounded by a landscaped yard with green grass, trees, and shrubs, and includes a paved driveway with a parked car and a detached garage. At the rear, there is a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, providing ample space for recreation and relaxation. The exterior is finished in light gray siding with white accents, and the roof is a dark gray shingle. The overall design reflects a blend of Colonial and Craftsman architectural elements, creating a welcoming and elegant residential appearance.
description: A two-story gray house with a gable roof, covered front porch, symmetrical windows, landscaped yard, driveway, detached garage, and a backyard deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard deck, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the side yard with trees and shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, white columns, and decorative trim
